// Why Most Brands Bleed Revenue

YOU'RE PAYING TO
ACQUIRE CUSTOMERS.
THEN LETTING THEM WALK.

📉

Flows Set Up Once, Never Optimised

Your abandoned cart email is the same one from 2021. Never A/B tested, never updated. Revenue leaks silently every day.

🔥

Blasting Your Whole List on Every Send

Sending the same email to buyers and cold subscribers tanks deliverability. Segmentation is what separates 60% open rates from spam folders.

💸

Paying for Acquisition With No Retention

Spending thousands to acquire once. Without retention, they buy once and disappear. LTV flatlines while CAC keeps climbing.

🕳️

No Attribution. No Reporting. Flying Blind.

Most brands have no idea what % of revenue comes from email. If you can't measure it, you can't scale it.

The average DTC brand doing $100K+/month is leaving $20K–$50K per month in untouched email revenue. Not a traffic problem. A retention system problem — completely fixable in 20 days.
// The System

RETENTION
REVENUE
ENGINEERING™

We don't "set up Klaviyo." We install a full retention revenue system — flows, campaigns, segmentation, deliverability, and reporting — that turns your existing customer base into a compounding revenue channel.

01
Week 1 · Days 1–7

Klaviyo Audit + Revenue Gap Report

We audit your entire account and produce a Revenue Gap Report — exact dollar value of what's sitting uncaptured in your list right now.

02
Weeks 2–3 · Days 7–20

5 Core Revenue Flows — Live

Welcome, Abandoned Cart, Browse Abandonment, Post-Purchase, Win-Back — all built and launched in 20 days. Running 24/7 on autopilot.

03
Ongoing · Monthly

Campaign Calendar + Advanced Segmentation

8–12 campaigns per month, each to the right segment at the right time. Your list becomes a compounding asset, not a liability.

04
Ongoing · Continuous

Deliverability Monitoring & Protection

Sender reputation, domain health, inbox placement — continuously managed so every send hits the inbox.

05
Ongoing · Monthly Reports

Performance Reporting & Optimisation

Full Klaviyo attribution, open/click/order rates, and next-month testing strategy. Async via Slack — zero unnecessary meetings.

IS THIS
FOR YOU?

✓ This Is For You If...

✅ You're a Shopify brand doing $80K–$600K+/month
✅ You have a list but aren't systematically monetising it
✅ You're spending on ads but have no retention backend
✅ You want fully done-for-you — not a course or template
✅ You want a long-term operator who owns the results
✅ You care about LTV growth and compounding retention value

✗ Not For You If...

🚫 You're pre-revenue or under $80K/month
🚫 You want to approve every email line-by-line
🚫 You want to DIY with "some guidance"
🚫 You're hunting for the cheapest option
🚫 You're not on Shopify + Klaviyo
🚫 You need weekly calls and daily check-ins
